case_title: LORENZO LOGORECI et al VS. FRED G MEIS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FRED MEIS, MEIS & ASSOCIATES AND MEIS & ALEXANDER'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE FRAUD ALLEGED BY PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PERTAIN TO THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARISE OUT OF THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT RELATIONSHIP DURING AND AFTER ITS TERMINATION.
